hypothesis: Equipping the LLM agent with explicit thermodynamic query tools that (i) return tie-line-connected phase pairs at a specified temperature/composition and (ii) compute the lever-rule composition for user-specified two-phase fractions at that temperature will raise its success rate on multi-phase Nb–O targets in this simulator (Challenges 2 and 3) from 0% to at least 50% over 10 independent runs per challenge without altering the kinetics model.
